title: [ImportVerilog] Fix class method prototype resolution
body:
This patch fixes a bug where class method forward declarations would have their function bodies resolved before all class property members had been analyzed; this led to errors of the form "unknown property X".

This patch fixes this by delaying the resolution of all method prototype's bodies until all other class members have been materialized. The added test crashes the compiler before this commit, but generates a correct class declaration and member function on the patched version.

EDIT: SV tests diff:
```
-102 error: unknown property `m_inst_id`
 +31 error: unsupported expression: NullLiteral
  -1 error: unsupported definition: interface
 -72 total change
```
